title: alopecurus alpestris
intro: Alopecurus alpestris, also known as Alpine Foxtail, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Alopecurus alpestris has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing swelling and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract issues. Alopecurus alpestris can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
